name: Cut the Strings
flavor: A snip of the fingers on a wire you already laid, and whatever was holding them up simply isn't.
description: You snip the wire fixed to a creature you have a String attached to within range, and its own body betrays it. Choose one effect below; the target resists with the listed saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}, and on a success it is unaffected. You must already have a String attached to the target to use this trick.

options.name: Disarm (Wisdom save)
options.effect: On a failed save, the target drops one item of your choice that it is holding.

options.name: Trip (Constitution save)
options.effect: On a failed save, the target is knocked prone.

sheetSummary: Bonus action, 60 ft, cooldown 2. Requires a String on the target. Choose one: Disarm (Wis save or drop one held item of your choice) or Trip (Con save or knocked prone). Success: no effect.
